MODULE: cosmos.containers.kubernetes_manager
FILE: cosmos/containers/kubernetes_manager.py (850 lines)
CATEGORY: containers

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Kubernetes Manager

"I've orchestrated a symphony of containers! Kubernetes is my conductor's baton!"

Comprehensive Kubernetes cluster and workload management.

CLASSES:
- PodPhase(Enum): Kubernetes pod phases.
- DeploymentStatus(Enum): Deployment status.
- K8sPod: Kubernetes pod information.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- K8sDeployment: Kubernetes deployment information.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- K8sService: Kubernetes service information.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- K8sNamespace: Kubernetes namespace information.
- KubernetesManager: Comprehensive Kubernetes management for cosmos.
